title: Frozen zombie castle
description: This mod adds a new castle in snowy bioms with a new mob, the frozen zombie.
body:
## Frozen Zombie Castle

A mod that adds a new castle to snowy biomes, along with the new Frozen Zombie.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baaca52c7605305324fe507a65e9ef3ab4bafeae.jpeg)

### Castle Structure:

- A castle surrounded by walls and powdered snow.
- Explore many rooms filled with loot and secrets.
- Includes a castle yard, towers, mob spawner and more.
- Inhabited by Frozen Zombies.
### New Mobs:

- The Frozen Zombie, available in two versions: a normal one and a weaponized version with a helmet and a stone sword.
- These zombies will spawn in snowy biomes.
- They drop a new item, Frozen Rotten Flesh.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb18f1c9ea864b1e4b21df70688631990e40a47c.jpeg)

### New Frozen Rotten Flesh Item:
### 
- When consumed, it causes Hunger like the regular version, along with a Freeze effect.
- Can be smelted in a furnace to grant XP.
  
## You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
